---
title: "Imad Dabbura"
subtitle: "AI Scientist"
description: "AI Scientist building ML systems from first principles."
image: images/profile-pic-web.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 14em
  image-shape: rounded
  id: hero-heading
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/imadphd
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/imaddabbura/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/imaddabbura
    - icon: medium
      text: Medium
      href: https://medium.com/@ImadPhd
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:imad.dabbura@hotmail.com
page-layout: full
css: assets/about.css
---

::: {#hero-heading}
I'm an AI Scientist who learns by building. I've spent the past decade working across smart devices, healthcare, and enterprise AI — designing ML systems, training models, and leading teams that ship to production.

The best way I've found to understand something is to build it from scratch — deriving the math, writing the code, and understanding every layer from first principles. That's what this site is: implementations, derivations, paper breakdowns, and notes from the process of figuring things out. When something breaks or surprises me, I write about that too.

### Background

- DMTS — AI Scientist
- Led AI/ML/Data Science teams building production GenAI and ML systems
- Built from-scratch implementations of GPT-2, LSTMs, transformers, a PyTorch-like framework, and more
- Hands-on experience across the full ML stack: data pipelines, model training, serving, and monitoring

### Get in Touch

I'm always happy to hear from readers — whether it's a correction, a question, or a suggestion for what to write about next. The best way to reach me is by email or on Twitter.

Resume available upon request.
:::
